name: straight_rectangular_duct
description: Iter01's plenum minus the blade — same 240x80x40 mm cavity as a clean straight duct. Multi-patch closed shell (3 named solids: inlet, outlet, walls). Isolates defect 2a (gmsh patch-name preservation) from defect 2b (interior-obstacle handling).

expected_outcome.qualitative_description: Fully developed parabolic-ish channel flow at low Re. Pressure drops linearly along the duct. No separation, no recirculation.
